sentences.arabic: أَقَامَتِ الْمَدِينَةُ مَهْرَجَانًا لِلطَّعَامِ هَذَا الأُسْبُوعَ.
sentences.translation: Grad je ovog sedmice organizovao festival hrane.
sentences.translationEn: The city held a food festival this week.

sentences.arabic: قَدَّمَ الطُّهَاةُ أَطْبَاقًا لَذِيذَةً مِنْ بُلْدَانٍ مُخْتَلِفَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Kuvari su ponudili ukusna jela iz različitih zemalja.
sentences.translationEn: The chefs offered delicious dishes from different countries.

sentences.translation: Posjetioci su probali hranu i jako im se svidjela.
sentences.translationEn: The visitors tried the food and liked it a lot.
The festival continues until the end of the week.
